chunks.title: Vision of the Glory and First Abomination
chunks.reason: Describes Ezekiel's transport to Jerusalem and the first vision of the figure of jealousy.

chunks.title: The Elders in the Room of Images
chunks.reason: Details the discovery of idols and elders worshipping in secret within a wall.

chunks.title: Women Weeping for Tammuz
chunks.reason: Records the specific idolatrous ritual of women mourning the deity Tammuz.

chunks.title: Men Worshipping the Sun and Final Oracle
chunks.reason: Shows men facing east to worship the sun followed by God's declaration of judgment.
